# AgentMeter

AgentMeter is an open-source, local-first Go and Vue dashboard for measuring
local coding-agent session usage from JSONL files. It indexes local session
data into SQLite and shows tokens, estimated cost, timing, sessions, projects,
models, tool-call behavior, and offline audit findings.

Project URL: https://github.com/LyleMi/AgentMeter
Public preview: https://blog.lyle.ac.cn/AgentMeter/
License: Apache-2.0

## Core Facts

- Runs locally and serves the Web UI on loopback by default.
- Reads local JSONL session files from supported coding agents.
- Stores normalized records in a local SQLite database.
- Does not proxy model traffic.
- Does not upload session data.
- Does not send telemetry.
- Supports Codex, Claude Code, CodeBuddy, WorkBuddy, and generic JSONL source
  directories.
- Provides Web and terminal interfaces over the same local data.
